subject: [PATCH v7 4/6] sunrpc: remove unused svc_version vs_count field

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch removes the unused vs_count field from struct svc_version and its associated percpu counters across various NFS-related modules. The removal is justified by the fact that svc_seq_show() and nfsd netlink stats handler no longer read these global counters. This change simplifies the code and reduces unnecessary memory usage.
